evidence_summary: Docs-only round publishes the planned settlement surface for the retained-child guard-cluster P5 lane, lineage and roadmap metadata checks pass, the artifact honestly republishes merged round-196 test-only evidence for sameLaneAliasFrameClearBoundaryExpr while keeping nestedForallContrastExpr fail-closed, and the stale scope helper is a plan-script defect because the adjusted status-based scope check shows only the settlement artifact and required implementation-notes were newly added implementation-owned paths.
